loss_reason: Rounds 11, 12 and 13 were all lost the exact same way: our lead man dry-peeked the same ramp corner and got picked by the same AWP every single round (round details are identical across 11-13). We kept feeding one entry frag into a known held angle three times in a row.

Same mistake three rounds in a row on A: we dry-peeked the site with zero utility. R10 detail: 'A执行没扔任何烟和闪, 直接dry进点, 死三个'. R11: 'A又是dry进点, 全队道具一个没用, 死四个'. R12: 'A第三次dry, 道具还是全带回家了' — we bought nades and brought them home unused, feeding into a set CT crossfire with no cover.

Rounds 9, 10, and 11 were lost the exact same way: our lurker was picked off alone in B tunnels (单独在B道被抓) three rounds in a row, forcing the whole team to open the round in a 4v5 disadvantage. We are not losing gunfights — we are giving up a man for free before contact every single round.

Rounds 14, 15 and 16 were the exact same loss: T faked at outside, our entire team rotated down, and A went completely empty and got taken instantly. We bit on the identical outside fake three rounds in a row, leaving zero players on A each time.

Rounds 14, 15, and 16 were all lost on the SAME A bomb spot: R14 the plant was too far forward and CT defused straight from default holding it; R15 same site, post-plant positions were cleaned by the identical CT setup; R16 a third plant on the same spot lost the residual/retake. They have our plant location and crossfires memorized.

Same mistake three rounds straight, not bad luck: the bomb carrier was used as the first man in every time. Round 13 the carrier entered first, died on the opening shot, and the C4 was dropped in open ground where nobody dared retrieve it; round 14 the carrier again entered first and died in the doorway, bomb lost again; round 15 the carrier was made the breacher a third time, died, and the bomb was gone outright. We are feeding the C4 to the enemy by putting it on our entry fragger.

We lost rounds 12-14 to self-inflicted economic collapse, not tactics: R12 the whole team was wiped and dropped every gun, resetting economy to zero (全队被打光, 经济归零); R13 we force-bought on empty pockets and got wiped 5-for-0 (强起失败, 又白给五个人); R14 we forced AGAIN with nothing left against a full-armor CT side (连续强起, 一分钱没剩, 对面满装). Three straight strong-forces into a full-equipment team.

Round 15: another half-buy ('又是半起') where the team spent all its money and still failed to win the round. Round 14: half-buy A rush was cleared by defenders holding angles ('被架点清光'). Round 13: B execute was repelled by defenders and 4 rifles were dropped and never recovered ('四把枪没带回来'). The pattern is back-to-back undisciplined half-buys draining the economy for zero rounds.

Three straight B losses to the same fast rush: R13 B was hit by a 4-man rush with only one defender and no rotation (一个人守没换到); R14 B rushed again with rotation 3 seconds too slow (补防慢了三秒); R15 B was overrun a third time still with only one player on site (第三次被冲穿, 还是只有一个人在点). Same B rush, consistently under-manned site.

R12: A execute was walled off at the choke by their double-AWP (连狙) and we fed 4 players into open angles with no smokes down. R13: eco rush B ran straight into a double-hold crossfire and got cleared instantly, no utility or trades. R14: half-buy slow mid-crawl got caught by the CT front-push and broke into a lost 1v3 retake. Common thread: committing bodies into set AWP/crossfire angles while under-equipped.

Route predictability, not aim: R15 our upper execute got pre-aimed and we never got onto site (上层执行被CT提前架住, 没进点); R16 a slow vents creep was heard and the whole team was trapped inside (vents慢摸被听到, 全队被堵在里面); R17 we ran vents AGAIN and the CTs were pre-stacked waiting, nobody came out (又走vents, CT早就在等, 一个没出来). Three straight rounds through vents/upper — they've hard-read it.

We lost R17-19 by repeatedly dry-pushing B water with no entry utility. R17: CTs smoked off water, we couldn't see and forced in, losing 3. R18: identical dry push into water, 3 dead again. R19: third straight raw push, detail explicitly notes '还是没有先手道具' (still no first-contact utility). Same target, same mistake, zero smokes/flashes of our own.

Not a tactics problem — a broken team economy (spread [5400,5200,1100,900,3400]). R15: we won R14 but two players won it with pistols, so the bank stayed uneven ('钱不平均'). R16: we ran an A execute while the two poor players had only pistols, they died on first contact and it became a 3v5. R17: same failure — the poor players died first and the two rich players were left to clutch an unwinnable retake.

Not a random loss — the same banana utility push beat us three straight rounds. R27: 'banana丢了控制权, B被打穿' (lost banana control, run through B). R28: '同样的道具压制, 直接输' (identical utility suppression won it again). R29: 'banana第三次丢' put us down 14-15. We keep losing the nade war into banana and B cracks.
No prior rounds to cite — this is the opening pistol round at 0-0 with both teams at $800. The call is built to win the pistol and start the economy snowball, not to fix a specific loss.

Rounds 12-14 were all self-inflicted man-down losses: R12 we tried to execute A with too few bodies ("A执行人不够, 被守住"), R13 we hard-pushed upper and got cleared in the 4v5 ("硬打上层, 人数劣势下被清"), and R14 we hard-pushed again with zero utility to offset the disadvantage ("没有利用道具弥补人数"). The pattern is dry gunfights while down a player, no utility to buy space.

Rounds 18, 19, and 20 were all lost the exact same way: our A site got taken by the enemy's default execute three consecutive times (R18 '站位太散', R19 'same default execute', R20 '第三次被同一套default打穿, 站位还是散的'). We keep spreading too thin, dying isolated with no crossfire or trade support against an identical, repeated A hit.

Rounds 17, 18, and 19 were the identical loss: we hit B, they smoked it off, and with no molotov we couldn't clear the standard post/corner behind the smoke. Round 17 we lost two players forcing it dry, then repeated the same mistake in 18 and 19 — a utility gap, not an aim problem.

Same window AWP punished us three rounds straight: R8 we lost mid control and he got a double off window, R9 he picked our entry at window on another slow mid push, R10 we ran an A execute but never smoked mid so he one-tapped our entry fragger through window. Common cause: we never smoke window out of the play.

Rounds 15-17 were all lost the same way on banana: R15 the T side cracked banana with four HE grenades plus a smoke and killed two of us in the nade stack with no trade; R16 the identical nade line cleared banana again and we lost B through the open after losing control; R17 we pre-emptively abandoned banana under the utility and gave them map control for free. We keep dying to the same grenade stack because we stand in the choke where it lands.

Rounds 12-14 were all lost the same way on Long: R12 the first man through the door was picked by the AWP with no refrag (后面没人补枪), R13 we dry-peeked the same door, got the opening man killed and retreated without trading (没有换人就撤了), and R14 was another Long dry peek where the AWP got a free kill and again we had no trade (我们没有trade). The concrete cause is dry-peeking a set AWP angle with no smoke and no trade partner.

Rounds 15-17 were all lost the same way: ramp/outside was under-manned and slow to react. R15 ramp had only one defender and was run straight through; R16 outside fell again with ramp rotation too slow, losing lower; R17 outside control was fully lost and four Ts pushed straight up ramp unopposed.

Rounds 11, 12 and 13 were all lost the same way: we ran the B execute straight into the donut crossfire without any utility. R11 'B执行在donut被交叉火力卡住, 进不去点', R12 'donut的交叉点没处理, 又死两个', R13 'B执行第三次, 还是donut交叉火力, 直接崩'. Three straight rounds hitting the identical uncleared crossfire — zero molotov/smoke spent to break it.

Rounds 14-16 were all lost to the exact same A execute: a simultaneous split from monster + long. In R14 our two A defenders got separated and died isolated; in R15 the same monster+long split hit and rotation/backup never arrived in time; in R16 A was split again with nobody watching the monster side at all.

Rounds 11-13 were all lost the exact same way: our first player dry-peeked the same ramp angle and was picked off by the same AWPer every time. R11 first man tapped on the ramp angle, R12 same ramp angle same AWP, R13 third peek of the identical angle, same AWP kill. We kept feeding the same AWP a free dry-peek.

All three losses (R10-12) are the identical mistake: dry A executes with zero utility. R10 A execute with no smoke/flash, dry into site, lost 3. R11 dry again, whole team used zero nades, lost 4. R12 third straight dry A with all utility brought home unused. We are buying nades and dying with them in our pockets.

Same mistake three rounds straight: our lurker peeled off solo into B tunnels and got picked every time — round 9 '\4v5打A失败', round 10 'lurker又一个人在B道被抓, 又是4v5', round 11 'lurker第三次单独被抓, 全队还是4v5开打'. We were down 4v5 before the fight started each round. This is a discipline/positioning problem, not a buy problem.

We lost rounds 14, 15 and 16 to the exact same outside fake: R14 - T faked outside, whole team rotated down and A went empty and was taken instantly; R15 - identical outside fake, we over-rotated again and A was empty; R16 - third time on the same fake, still nobody holding A. It's a rotation-discipline problem, not utility or aim.

Rounds 14, 15, and 16 were all lost to the exact same mistake on A: R14 the bomb was planted too far forward and the CT held it straight from default and defused (被从default直接架住拆掉); R15 we planted the same spot again and post-plant positions got cleared by the identical CT setup; R16 was the third plant in the same location and we couldn't hold the resulting 残局. We kept feeding a defuse they had already solved.

Same mistake three rounds straight: our bomb carrier keeps being the entry fragger and dies first. R13 - carrier entered the site first, died the instant he peeked, bomb dropped in open ground and nobody could grab it. R14 - carrier entried again, died in the doorway, bomb lost. R15 - carrier took the entry role a third time, died on contact, bomb gone. The bomb is on the man who dies first every round.

Rounds 13-14 log it plainly: '强起失败, 又白给五个人' and '连续强起, 一分钱没剩, 对面满装' — back-to-back force-buys off near-zero money failed, handed them 5 free kills, and left us broke while they went full-loaded. R12 wiped us and dropped all our guns, zeroing the economy that the forcing then never let us rebuild.

R13: B execute got repelled by the anchor and four rifles were left on site un-retrieved, wrecking our economy. R14: half-buy rush A got cleaned up by players holding angles with no util to clear holds. R15: another half-buy where we spent all our money and still lost the round. The pattern is repeated doomed half-buys draining our bank.

Same death three rounds straight: B was overrun with only ONE defender each time. R13 '四个人快冲, 一个人守没换到' (4-man rush, lone anchor couldn't trade), R14 '补防慢了三秒' (rotation 3s too slow), R15 '第三次被冲穿, 还是只有一个人在点' (rushed through again, still just one man on B). It's a setup problem, not a firepower one — a solo anchor can't trade a 4-man rush.

Three straight losses to prepared long-range angles: R12 our A execute got walled by AWP crossfire ('A执行被连狙拒之门外, 白给4人'), R13 our eco B rush went in with no utility and got cleaned by the double crossfire ('被双架点交叉火力清光'), and R14 our half-buy slow-peeked mid and got front-pushed by CTs into a lost 1v3 ('中路慢摸, 被CT前顶打乱'). Common thread: we keep exposing ourselves to set AWP/crossfire angles either too slow or with no smokes.

Three straight self-inflicted losses, all on predictable T executes: R15 the upper execute walked into a pre-aimed CT hold with no entry (上层执行被CT提前架住, 没进点); R16 a slow vents creep was heard and the whole team got trapped inside (vents慢摸被听到, 全队被堵在里面); R17 we ran vents AGAIN and CT was already waiting, nobody got out (又走vents, CT早就在等, 一个没出来). The CTs have read our vents habit cold.

Rounds 17-19 were all lost the same way at B: R17 the CT smoked water and we peeked blind and lost 3 ('B点water被烟封住看不见，我们硬冲死三个'), R18 we ran the identical dry push and again lost 3 ('B又硬冲water，同样死三个'), and R19 was a third dry entry with explicitly no lead-off utility ('B第三次硬冲，还是没有先手道具'). The problem isn't the site — it's peeking into their smoke three times with zero smokes/flashes of our own.

Not aim or execution — pure economic imbalance. R15: we won R14 but two players took it with pistols, leaving money uneven ('钱不平均'). R16: on the A execute the two broke players had only pistols, 'died on contact' and it became a 3v5. R17: same again — the poor players died first and the two rich players couldn't clutch the residual. Our spread [5400,5200,1100,900,3400] keeps sending two naked pistol bodies in first.

All three losses (R27, R28, R29) were the identical failure: banana lost control to their utility pressure and B got cracked open — R27 'banana丢了控制权, B被打穿', R28 '又是banana, 同样的道具压制, 直接输', R29 'banana第三次丢'. They've solved our banana three times with the same nade package.
N/A - this is the opening pistol round (score 0-0, recent_rounds is empty), so there is no prior round loss to cite. The plan is based on the 800 starting economy, not a mistake to correct.

Rounds 12-14 were all lost the same way: down a man 4v5 after the disconnect, we still forced straight gunfights. R12 had too few bodies to execute A and got held; R13 and R14 hard-pushed upper and got cleaned in the numbers disadvantage. R14's log states it outright ('没有利用道具弥补人数') — we took the 4v5 with no utility to offset it.

We lost rounds 18, 19, and 20 to the exact same play: the enemy ran an identical A default execute all three times (R18 'A点被默认打法拿下, 我们站位太散', R19 'A又被同样的default execute拿下', R20 'A第三次被同一套default打穿, 站位还是散的'). Our A hold was spread too thin every round and we did nothing to disrupt their setup, so the same execute walked through untouched.

Rounds 17, 18, and 19 were all lost the exact same way: we hit B with no molotov to clear a held pick position. R17 '"B点被烟封住, 我们没有molotov清点, 硬冲死两个"', R18 '"B又没有molotov, 同样的点位清不掉"', R19 '"B第三次, 还是没带molotov"'. We kept dry-peeking a smoked-off angle and trading two players for free — a utility problem, not aim.

Rounds 8-10 were all lost to the same enemy AWP holding the window angle from mid: R8 he got a double in window when we lost mid control, R9 he picked our entry in window on another slow mid push, and R10 our A execute went in without smoking window so he one-tapped our entry fragger through open mid.

Rounds 15-17 were all lost the same way on banana: in R15 the T side forced with a 4x HE + smoke stack and our two players got nade-killed in the choke with no trade; in R16 the identical nade barrage cleared banana again and once control was gone B got played through; in R17 we conceded banana for free under the same utility. The through-line is feeding bodies into the choke against a scripted nade stack and dying without trades.

We lost R12-14 the exact same way each time: an AWP holding the Long doors angle. R12 our first man through the doors got picked with no refrag; R13 we hit Long again, doors man died to the same AWP angle and we backed off without trading; R14 was a dry peek where the AWP got another free frag and again we had no trade. We keep feeding one player at a time into a held AWP with zero utility and no trade partner.

Three straight rounds (R15-R17) were lost the same way: we gave up outside/ramp control for free. R15 ramp was held by only ONE player and got run straight through; R16 outside fell again and ramp backfill/rotation arrived too late so lower was taken; R17 outside control was completely gone and four T's pushed up ramp uncontested. The concrete cause is an under-manned, un-utility'd ramp hold.

Rounds 11-13 were all lost to the exact same mistake: repeated B executes into the donut crossfire. R11 got pinched in donut and couldn't enter site (进不去点), R12 hit B again without dealing with the crossfire and lost two (交叉点没处理, 又死两), R13 was a third straight B execute into the identical donut crossfire and collapsed outright (还是donut交叉火力, 直接崩).

Three straight losses to the identical A execute — a monster+long split. R14: A defenders got isolated and died one-at-a-time to the simultaneous split. R15: same monster+long split, rotation/backup arrived too late. R16: A split again with the monster direction completely unwatched. It's a setup/timing problem, not aim.

Rounds 11, 12, and 13 were all lost identically: our first man dry-peeked the same ramp angle and was picked by the same AWP each time (round 11: first peeker headshot by AWP; round 12: same ramp, same AWP; round 13: third dry-peek of that ramp, same AWP). It's a repeated peeking-discipline failure feeding the AWPer free entry kills.

Three straight A-site losses to the identical mistake: R10 '"A执行没扔任何烟和闪, 直接dry进点, 死三个"' (dry hit, zero smoke/flash, lost 3), R11 '"A又是dry进点, 全队道具一个没用, 死四个"' (dry again, whole team used no utility, lost 4), R12 '"A第三次dry, 道具还是全带回家了"' (third dry, all nades brought home unused). We keep buying utility and dying with it in our pockets while walking into set crossfires.

Rounds 9, 10, and 11 were all lost the exact same way: our lurker got picked off alone in B (tunnels/doorway) every single round, forcing the remaining team to open the site as a 4v5 on A and lose the man-down fight. Three straight rounds, same mistake — we lose a body before the round starts.

Not aim or economy — a discipline breakdown. Rounds 14, 15, and 16 were the identical trick three times in a row: T faked outside, we full-rotated the whole team down, and A site went empty and got taken instantly ('A点空了被秒'/'A点又空'/'A点还是没人'). We kept biting on the same outside fake.

We lost R14-16 by running the identical A play three times: R14 the bomb was planted too far forward so a CT holding from default simply held the angle and defused it clean; R15 same bombsite and our post-plant positions were cleared by the exact same CT setup; R16 a third plant on the same spot left us unable to hold the closing 1vX. They've fully read our A default plant and are farming it.

Same repeated mistake in rounds 13-15: the bomb carrier kept being the first man into the site. R13 the carrier entered first, died instantly, and the bomb dropped in the open where no one could retrieve it; R14 the carrier again entered first and died in the doorway, bomb lost again; R15 the carrier played entry a third time, died, and the bomb was gone. It's a role/positioning error, not an aim or economy problem.

Self-inflicted economic collapse from repeated force-buys, not tactics. R12: whole team wiped, all guns dropped, economy zeroed (全队被打光, 枪全掉了, 经济归零). R13: force-bought off that broke economy and got wiped 5-for-nothing (强起失败, 又白给五个人). R14: forced AGAIN with no money left vs their fully-kitted team (连续强起, 一分钱没剩, 对面满装). Three straight forces into a 6200-econ team dug the hole deeper.

Three straight losses came from forcing on a broken economy: R13 our B execute was repelled by their holding guns and we left four rifles on the ground (四把枪没带回来); R14 a half-buy rush A got picked apart by their anglers (被架点清光); R15 another half-buy where we spent every dollar and still didn't win the round (钱全花光还是没拿到回合).

Not a general failure — the exact same B-site rush killed us three rounds straight: R13 B was hit by a 4-man fast rush with only one player on site and no trade; R14 B rushed again and backup rotation arrived ~3 seconds too late; R15 B was pushed through a third time, still with only a single anchor on site. The pattern is a solo B defender plus late rotates.

Three straight losses came from walking into open AWP/crossfire angles with no utility: R12 the A execute was walled off by a double AWP crossfire and gave up 4 free kills; R13 the eco B-rush ran into a double-anchor crossfire and got cleaned out; R14 a slow-mid half-buy got caught by a CT front-push and collapsed into a lost 1v3. Common thread: dry peeks into set angles with no smoke/flash to cut them.

We are getting read on the same route. R15: upper execute walked into a pre-set CT hold ('上层执行被CT提前架住, 没进点'). R16: slow-crept vents, got heard, whole team trapped inside ('vents慢摸被听到, 全队被堵在里面'). R17: went vents AGAIN, CT pre-stacked it and nobody got out ('又走vents, CT早就在等, 一个没出来'). Two straight rounds down the same telegraphed vents choke with zero adaptation.

Rounds 17-19 were lost the same way three times in a row: on B we dry-pushed water while it was smoked off and got traded 3 each time. R17 detail: B water smoked, no vision, hard rush lost 3. R18: identical hard rush into water, lost 3. R19 detail explicitly says '没有先手道具' — we rushed a third time with no entry utility. We keep running into their crossfire blind.

Not a tactics failure but an economy-discipline failure. R15: we won on pistols so money came out uneven (钱不平均). R16: we forced an A execute anyway and the two broke players had only pistols, died on first contact, and it collapsed to a 3v5 (穷的两个人只有pistol, 一碰就死, 变成3v5). R17: same again — the poor players died first and the two rich players were left in an unwinnable clutch (穷的人先死, 富的两个人打不了残局). We keep half-buying when two teammates (900/1100) can't afford weapons; a proper galil loadout costs $3300, not even affordable on our $3200 average, so forcing repeats the exact loss.

Rounds 27, 28, and 29 were lost the exact same way: we lost Banana control and got cleared out of B by utility pressure ('banana丢了控制权, B被打穿' / '同样的道具压制'). Three straight rounds we tried to hold a forward Banana peek and got burned/flashed off the choke before their entry even arrived.
N/A - this is the opening round (score 0-0, recent_rounds is empty), so there are no prior losses to cite. This is a pistol-round call based on the $800 economy.

All three losses trace to fighting 4v5 without offsetting the man disadvantage: R12 'A执行人不够, 被守住' (too few bodies to execute A, got held), R13 '硬打上层, 人数劣势下被清' (hard-pushed upper into the 4v5 and got cleared), and most tellingly R14 '没有利用道具弥补人数' (force-fought again with no utility to make up for being a man down).

We lost rounds 18, 19 and 20 the exact same way: A was taken by the same T default execute three straight rounds. R18 'A点被默认打法拿下, 我们站位太散' (positions too spread), R19 'A又被同样的default execute拿下' (same execute again), R20 'A第三次被同一套default打穿, 站位还是散的' (punched through a third time, still spread). We keep scattering thin on A and getting picked one-by-one instead of trading against their coordinated hit.

Rounds 17, 18, and 19 were all lost identically at B: the CTs smoke off the choke and we had no molotov to clear the pinch/dark corner, so we dry-peeked into the smoke and traded two players each round (R17 '硬冲死两个'). Same position, three straight rounds, same missing molotov.

All three rounds (8,9,10) were lost to the SAME enemy AWPer holding the window angle from mid. R8: we lost mid control and the AWP got a double at window. R9: we slow-pushed mid again and the AWP picked our entry at window. R10 (the key one): we ran an A execute WITHOUT smoking window/mid first, and the AWP one-shot our entry fragger through the open window. Same angle, same player, three straight rounds — a utility discipline failure, not an aim problem.

Rounds 15-17 were all lost to the same Banana utility script: R15 they cracked Banana with 4x HE + smoke and nade-killed two of our players with no trade; R16 the identical nade line-up cleared Banana again and let them punch through to B; R17 we ceded Banana for free under that same utility pressure, giving them map control at zero cost.

Three straight rounds (12, 13, 14) lost the same way on Long: R12 Long execute, first man through the door picked by their AWP and nobody re-peeked to refrag; R13 went Long again, first man died in the doorway and the team backed off without trading; R14 a dry peek Long fed the AWP another free kill with no trade. Their AWPer is farming our lone doorway man because we keep peeking Long one-at-a-time, no smoke, no trade.

Rounds 15-17 were all lost the same way: we kept undermanning ramp/outside. R15 had only one defender on ramp who got run straight through ('ramp防守只有一个人直接被冲穿'); R16 the rotation to ramp was too slow and we lost lower ('ramp补防太慢, 下层被拿'); R17 four Ts pushed ramp uncontested with no utility to stop them ('ramp直接被四个人压进来'). One repeating problem: too few bodies and zero fire in the ramp choke.

Not an economy issue — the same tactical error three rounds straight. R11 we ran B and got stuck in donut on the crossfire ('被交叉火力卡住, 进不去点'), R12 we ran B again and lost two players because the donut crossfire was never cleared ('donut的交叉点没处理, 又死两个'), R13 we forced B a third time and got dry-peeked apart on the identical crossfire ('还是donut交叉火力, 直接崩'). We keep entering an uncleared crossfire with no utility, and they've read it.

Three straight losses (R14-R16) to the identical A double-pincer: monster + long split simultaneously. R14 our two A defenders got isolated and died individually (被分割各自死); R15 same split but rotation/补防 arrived too late; R16 A split again with monster completely unwatched (monster方向完全没人看). Same setup, same mistake — nobody anchoring monster and defenders fighting alone instead of trading.

Rounds 11, 12, and 13 were lost the exact same way: our first player dry-peeked the same ramp angle each round and got picked by the same AWP all three times (同一个ramp角, 第一个人探头被同一把AWP点掉). We fed that AWPer three free opening frags on an identical peek.

Rounds 10-12 were all lost the exact same way: dry A executes. R10 the team entered A with no smokes or flashes thrown and lost 3. R11 was another dry A push with the entire team's utility unused, losing 4. R12 was a third straight dry A with grenades carried home unused. This is a utility-usage failure on execute, not an aim problem.

Rounds 9, 10, and 11 were all lost the exact same way: our lurker was picked off alone in B tunnels each time (一个人在B道被抓), forcing the rest of the team to open the A site 4v5. Three straight rounds of entering a man down.

Rounds 14, 15 and 16 were the identical loss: T faked outside on Nuke, our entire team over-rotated down/outside, leaving A completely empty and getting the site taken instantly each time. Round 16 detail confirms we bit on the same outside fake a third straight round with nobody left on A.

Not an economy issue — self-inflicted, repeated mistake. R14: A plant was too far forward and CT held/defused it straight from default. R15: we planted the exact same spot and post-plant got cleaned by the identical CT play. R16: third time on the same plant spot, we couldn't hold the resulting 1vX. They've pre-solved one bomb position three rounds running.

Same mistake three rounds straight: the bomb carrier is being used as the entry fragger. R13 包手第一个进点一开枪就死, 包掉在开阔地没人敢捡; R14 包手又是第一个进, 死在门口, 包捡不回来; R15 包手第三次当突破手, 死后包直接丢了. Every round the carrier dies first and the bomb lands in open ground we can't retrieve — a role/positioning problem, not aim or economy.

Not a mechanics problem — an economy-discipline problem. Round 13 was an explicit failed force ('强起失败, 又白给五个人') that handed them all five kills; Round 14 we forced AGAIN ('连续强起, 一分钱没剩, 对面满装'), leaving us at zero while they went fully kitted. Round 12 had already zeroed us ('经济归零'). Three straight rounds of throwing money into unwinnable forces is why they're at $6200 and we're at $750.

R13: B execute got stuffed by their anchors and we left 4 rifles on the ground. R14: half-buy (半起) rush A got cleared one-by-one on the angles. R15: another half-buy where we spent all our money and still won nothing. R14/R15 are the same mistake twice — forcing on partial money with no util or coordination, feeding their economy.

All three losses (R13-15) were the same B-site under-defense, not a strategy flaw: R13 '4个人快冲, 一个人守没换到' — 4-man rush vs one defender with no trade; R14 'B又被冲, 补防慢了三秒' — rushed again, rotation arrived 3 seconds too late; R15 'B第三次被冲穿, 还是只有一个人在点' — third straight rush with still only one man on site. They found a free round and are hammering B faster than we can rotate.

Three straight uncoordinated commits into set defensive angles: R12 A-execute denied by their double AWP (连狙), feeding 4 players into crossed sniper angles; R13 eco rush B ran straight into the double-anchor crossfire and got cleared; R14 half-buy slow mid got broken by a CT front-push, lost the 1v3. Common thread: under-armed, under-utilitied bodies walking into AWP/crossfire angles.

We lost R15-R17 to predictability, not aim: R15 the upper execute walked into a CT pre-holding the angle (上层执行被CT提前架住, 没进点), R16 a slow vents creep got heard and the team was bottled up inside (vents慢摸被听到, 全队被堵在里面), and R17 we ran vents AGAIN into a pre-set CT and nobody survived (又走vents, CT早就在等, 一个没出来). Three straight rounds feeding the same vents/upper read for free CT kills.

Three straight rounds we dry-pushed B water into the enemy's smoke with no utility of our own: R17 B water was smoked off, we couldn't see and blind-pushed, lost 3; R18 we ran the exact same dry push into water and lost 3 again; R19 was a third dry push with no entry flash or smoke. They now stack B water every round expecting us.

Rounds 16-17 were lost to money imbalance, not tactics: in R16 our two broke players (900/1100) had only pistols, died on contact during the A execute and turned it into a 3v5; in R17 the poor players died first again and the two rich riflers couldn't win the resulting clutch. Spread [5400,5200,1100,900,3400] means unmanaged self-buys repeat this.

Not a general slump — the identical death three rounds running. Round 27 (their match point) we lost banana control and B got broken open; Round 28 was 'again banana, same utility suppression, straight loss'; Round 29 banana fell a third time, dropping us to 14-15. Every loss is us contesting banana forward and getting naded/suppressed off it.
N/A — this is the opening pistol round (score 0-0, recent_rounds empty), so there are no prior round details to cite; this is a clean pistol-round setup rather than a reaction to a loss.

Not a pure man-count problem — it's zero utility usage. Round 14 detail is explicit: '4v5又硬打, 没有利用道具弥补人数' (hard-pushed again, did not use utility to compensate for the man disadvantage). Round 12 we dry-executed A with too few bodies ('A执行人不够, 被守住'), and Round 13 we dry-peeked upper into a numbers loss ('硬打上层, 人数劣势下被清'). Three straight rounds buying guns but throwing no coordinated smokes/flashes to open space.

Rounds 18-20 were all lost to the identical A default execute three times in a row: R18 'A点被默认打法拿下, 我们站位太散' (spread too thin), R19 'A又被同样的default execute拿下' (same default), R20 'A第三次被同一套default打穿, 站位还是散的' (third time, still spread). Not a money issue — they solved our A and we keep giving them the same open, over-spread setup.

Rounds 17-19 were all lost the same way at B: the CT held a fixed position (R17 '被烟封住...没有molotov清点,硬冲死两个'; R18 '又没有molotov,同样的点位清不掉'; R19 'B第三次,还是没带molotov'). We repeatedly dry-peeked the same held B spot with no molotov to burn them off it and traded two entries each time.

Rounds 8-10 were all lost to the same mid AWP holding window: R8 we lost mid control and the AWP picked two players off window; R9 a slow mid push let the same AWP tag our entry through window; R10 we executed A without smoking window and the AWP one-tapped our entry fragger. Common cause: window is never smoked before we commit to mid.

Rounds 15-17 were all lost to the same T banana grenade stack: in R15 they threw 4 HE + a smoke into banana and nade-killed two of our players with no trade; in R16 the identical nade setup cleared banana again, we lost control and B got opened up; in R17 we pre-emptively abandoned the point under that same utility and handed them free control. One repeatable problem — we hold too far up banana and eat the same grenades every round.

Rounds 12-14 were all lost the same way on Long: R12 we executed Long and the first man in the doorway was picked by their AWP with no one trading him (后面没人补枪); R13 we hit Long again and died in the same doorway, then backed off without a trade (没有换人就撤了); R14 was a Long dry peek where the AWP got another free opening kill because we had no utility and no trade (没有 trade). Same repeated mistake: dry-peeking Long into a set AWP and giving free opening picks with zero trade support.

Rounds 15-17 were all lost the same way — the ramp/outside breakdown. R15: outside taken and ramp defended by only one player who got run straight through. R16: outside lost again and ramp backup came too slow, so lower was taken. R17: total loss of outside control with ramp pushed by four players at once. The issue is a lone ramp defender with no utility to stall and no fast rotation.

Rounds 11-13 were all lost to the exact same mistake: repeated B executes into an unaddressed donut crossfire. R11 got stuck in donut and never entered site; R12 ran B again, left the donut crossfire untouched and lost two; R13 was a third straight dry B execute into the same crossfire that collapsed us. We fed the identical angle three rounds running with no utility to break it.

Not random - it's the identical round lost three times: R14 A was split by monster+long simultaneously and our two A defenders got isolated and traded apart; R15 same monster+long split and our support rotation didn't arrive in time; R16 A split again with nobody watching the monster side at all. They've solved our A setup and monster goes uncontested.
